calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-30-2004 Continued To Apr-05-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-05-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES:

This Cause came as reassignment from the Presiding Judge Department for Court Trial.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, CSR: Ron Sinclair, Clerk:Marta Vallejo
Appearances:
Arnold W. Evje II, Esq. For Plaintiff: Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc, the Property Manager: Sean Hughes also present, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff: Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc. and against the defendant: Samuel Hall
As follows: Restitution and possession of the premies located at: 520 South Van Ness Avenue #275, San Francisco, CA
Back rent of $1,031.33
Hold over damages of $55.88
Costs of $148.30
For the total of $1,731.51
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-05-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-30-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for settlement conference this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sara Lerschen.
Arnold Evje II, Esq., for Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc.
No appearance by the Defendant: Samuel Hall.
Settlement Conference is taken off-calendar.
Defendant's Jury Demand is strickene.
Case to proceed as Court Trial, date confirmed.
